City of Visto
ApriT 20, 1992
Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance Division
428 J Street Ste. 610
Sacramento, CA.95814
RE: Request for j.nformation
Please send a written response to the following question.
THE SITUATfON
A committee was formed with the purpose listed on the Form 410
"Recall Petition (Mayor). "
After collecting and spending, a balance of S110O.47 was shown
the Form 419 Campaign Statement, covering the period from
organization to December 31, 1991. The comnittee subsequently
ceased their efforts to obtain slgnatures on the petition and
announced to the press that the recall- effort had been "called
off . "
At the time of filing the semi annual statement, the committee
decided to continue in existence but wanted to change their
purpose to a general purpose "watchdog" committee.
An amended statement of orEanization was filed.
THE OUESTION
Was it proper for them to file an amended statement of
organization and continue on with a different purpose, or was
necessary for tr'rem to oj-ssolve, dispose or ri-re $riUU.47, fiie
Form 415, and then file a new Form 41O to establish themselves
a "watchdog" committee?
Thank you for your prompt wrj-tten rep1y.
Very truly yor).rs,

sections.question: Was it proper for them to file an amended statement of organization and continue on with a different purpose, or was it necessary for them to dissolve, dispose of the $1100.47, file Form 415, and then file a new Form 410 to establish themselves as a "watchdog" committee?
sections.question_synthetic: A recall committee that ceased efforts and had a remaining balance requested guidance on whether it could amend its statement of organization to change its purpose to a general watchdog committee, or whether it was required to dissolve, dispose of funds, and file new formation documents.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request from a city clerk, not an FPPC response letter. The document contains the situation and question but no FPPC conclusion or advice. Document appears to have some OCR errors (e.g., 'j.nformation', 'SITUATfON', 'comnittee'). No CONCLUSION section present, so conclusion fields are null.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: Was it proper for them to file an amended statement of organization and continue on with a different purpose, or was it necessary for them to dissolve, dispose of the $1100.47, file Form 415, and then file a new Form 410 to establish themselves as a "watchdog" committee?

embedding.summary: The City Clerk of Vista submitted an information request to the FPPC asking whether a recall committee that collected $1100.47 and ceased efforts could properly amend its statement of organization to become a general-purpose watchdog committee, or whether it was required to dissolve and file new formation documents.
